{{Quote|Are you insane? I mean, that's ''my'' ship you're talking about!|Kar Lamoran objects to a Rebel plan to commandeer the ''Stellar Manx''|<ref name="Rogue Squadron to the Rescue">''[[Star Wars Missions 18: Rogue Squadron to the Rescue]]''</ref>}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Kar Lamoran''' of the [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transport]] ''[[Stellar Manx]]'' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], her [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was commandeered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]], but she managed to [[Mission to Kwenn Space Station|take it back]] with help from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Flight]]. She then accompanied the Rebels to [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]].

==Biography==
Kar Lamoran was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who [[Captain/Legends|captained]] the [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transport]] ''[[Stellar Manx]]'' not long after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Eight crewmembers served with her aboard the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], as did an [[R5-series astromech droid]] and an [[ASP-7 labor droid/Legends|ASP-7 labor droid]]. On their way back from a supply run to the [[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous system]], the crew stopped at [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]] to [[Fuel/Legends|refuel]] and were met by two [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. The [[Transport/Legends|transport]] was commandeered, and the nine organic members of the crew were taken to the [[Space station/Legends|station's]] [[Prison/Legends|prison facilities]]. Luckily for them, a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Flight]] managed to [[Mission to Kwenn Space Station|rescue]] them, [[Lightfight|fighting off]] two [[Trooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] in the process. Lamoran was determined to help the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], but he insisted it was too dangerous and sent the crew to inform the rest of Rogue [[Flight group/Legends|Flight]] of his plans—he was heading to [[Docking Bay 238]] to see where the Empire planned to take the ''Stellar Manx''.<ref name="Rogue Squadron to the Rescue" />

Lamoran was determined to get her own [[Freighter/Legends|ship]] back and followed the Rogue to the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]], where she helped him dispose of more [[Troop/Legends|stormtroopers]]. The ''Stellar Manx'' suddenly took off before they could board, and Lamoran ran to tell Rogue Flight that their wayward member was going after it in an emergency vehicle. With Rogue Flight was the Rebel [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who [[Comlink/Legends|commed]] the adventurous Rogue and warned him that Lamoran's ASP [[Droid/Legends|droid]] might shoot him on sight. The Rogue was able to overcome that final obstacle in his path and return the ship to the station, where Lamoran joined an impromptu Rebel conference. The Rebel [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-D2]] learned from the ''Stellar Manx''{{'s}} [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] that the Imperials had intended to take it to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]], and the Rebels decided to take it there themselves to investigate the Empire's activities. Lamoran initially objected to the idea, but the Rebel leader [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] convinced her of its wisdom.<ref name="Rogue Squadron to the Rescue" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 18: Rogue Squadron to the Rescue]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 19: Bounty on Bonadan]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 20: Total Destruction]]''
